data.title: AGF Investments Announces July 2026 Cash Distributions for AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund, AGF Enhanced U.S. Income Plus Fund, AGF Total Return Bond Fund and AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF
data.description: Today, AGF Investments Inc. declared the July 2026 cash distributions for certain funds. Unitholders recorded on July 31, 2026, will receive distributions on August 7, 2026. The funds include AGF Enhanced U.S. Equity Income Fund*, AGF Enhanced U.S. Income Plus Fund*, AGF Total Return Bond Fund*, and AGF Systematic Global Infrastructure ETF. The specific distribution amounts per unit were also disclosed.

data.title: CN Delivers on Commitments with Strong Second Quarter Results and Raises 2026 Guidance
data.description: On July 24, 2026, CN (CNR) (CNI) released its financial and operating results for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, based in Montreal.

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics updates on submission for Arimoclomol for Niemann-Pick Disease Type C in the EU. #NPC #regulatory #EU
data.description: In the latest development, the government has announced a new economic stimulus package worth $900 billion to combat the financial impacts of the ongoing pandemic. This relief bill includes direct payments of $600 to qualifying individuals and an additional $600 per dependent child. The package also provides $300 a week in enhanced unemployment benefits and funding for small business loans. Furthermore, $25 billion will be allocated for rental assistance and an extension of the eviction moratorium. This new legislation comes as the unemployment rate remains high at 6.7% and as many struggle to make ends meet during these challenging times.

data.title: Postal Realty Trust, Inc. to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 4, 2026
data.description: CEDARHURST, N.Y.- On July 24, 2026, Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) disclosed plans to release its financial outcomes for the period concluding on June 30, 2026. The real estate investment trust, managing 2,300+ properties leased majorly to the United States Postal Service, from small post offices to industrial sites, will make the announcement post market closure on Tuesday, August 4, 2026.

data.title: Radiopharm Theranostics Announces Concurrent US$4.1 Million Registered Direct Offering and Up To Additional A$12.7 (US$8.9) Million Australian Placement and Share Purchase Plan
data.description: Radiopharm Theranostics Limited, a biopharmaceutical company, has signed a Securities Purchase Agreement with U.S. accredited institutional investors to issue 1,281,646 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at an offering price of US$3.16 per ADS. This represents 384,493,800 ordinary shares (1 ADS = 300 ordinary shares), with total gross proceeds around US$4.1 million. The company focuses on developing oncology radiopharmaceuticals for high unmet medical needs.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace to Develop High-Power Charging Technology to Enable Commercial Electric Aviation
data.description: Bristol, England - Vertical Aerospace (NYSE: EVTL) has revealed plans to spearhead the advancement of high-power charging and thermal management technology with the UK Government-backed ECLiPSE (Electrified Charging & Liquid-cooling Provision for Support of E-flights) program. This initiative aims to support the growing electric aviation sector as it progresses towards commercial functionalities. The development will be led by Vertical Aerospace, a leading aerospace and technology firm, to enhance charging infrastructure for electric flights.

data.title: ACCO Brands Corp announces quarterly dividend payout.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly dropped to 4.5%, marking a decrease of 1.2% compared to the previous quarter. The data also shows a notable increase in job creation, with over 350,000 new jobs added in various sectors. Additionally, the report highlights a positive trend in the GDP growth rate, which has climbed to 5.2% this year, showcasing a strong economic recovery. These figures indicate a promising outlook for the country's labor market and overall economy.

data.title: Treace to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 7, 2026
data.description: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on July 24, 2026, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TMCI), a company revolutionizing bunion and midfoot deformity surgeries, disclosed plans to unveil its Q2 2026 financial results on August 7, 2026, before the market opens. The conference call led by company executives to review the financial performance will kick off at 8:00 am ET.
